$value[0]['inline_template']
<p><strong>Preparation-1:</strong></p><p>Weighed and transferred {INPUT_1} (600 mg) of test sample into a {INPUT_2} (5 mL) volumetric flask and added {INPUT_3} (3 mL) of diluent and vortex to dissolve. Centrifuge for {INPUT_4} (5) minutes at {INPUT_5} (7000) Rpm at {INPUT_6} (25) °C. Filtered the solution through {INPUT_7} (0.22) µm PVDF filter and discard first {INPUT_8} (1) mL solution.</p><p><strong>Preparation-2:</strong></p><p>Weighed and transferred {INPUT_9} (600 mg) of test sample into a {INPUT_10} (5 mL) volumetric flask and added {INPUT_11} (3 mL) of diluent and vortex to dissolve. Centrifuge for {INPUT_12} (5) minutes at {INPUT_13} (7000) Rpm at {INPUT_14} (25) °C. Filtered the solution through {INPUT_15} (0.22) µm PVDF filter and discard first {INPUT_16} (1) mL solution.</p><p><strong>Preparation-3:</strong></p><p>Weighed and transferred {INPUT_17} (600 mg) of test sample into a {INPUT_18} (5 mL) volumetric flask and added {INPUT_19} (3 mL) of diluent and vortex to dissolve. Centrifuge for {INPUT_20} (5) minutes at {INPUT_21} (7000) Rpm at {INPUT_22} (25) °C. Filtered the solution through {INPUT_23} (0.22) µm PVDF filter and discard first {INPUT_24} (1) mL solution.</p>
